positive: A stylized, minimalist cosmic forest scene. Two bioluminescent, stylized flora forms dominate the foreground, emanating soft gradients of turquoise and emerald green light. The background features a deep indigo and violet nebula sky, rendered with intricate, glowing particle patterns resembling stardust. The silhouettes of abstract, ancient trees and glowing, non-representational space creatures populate the middle ground. Style: Neo-Art Deco cosmic fantasy, vector illustration quality, heavy use of negative space, perfect symmetry, high contrast between glowing elements and deep shadows. Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro focusing on the glow sources. Composition: Central focus, optimized for t-shirt placement, clean edges, crisp lines. Color direction: Deep cosmic jewel tones, electric blue, vibrant magenta, and neon green accents.
negative: blur, noise, grain, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn face, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, artifact, solid background, muddy color
